description: You are an Event Coordinator finalizing the layout for a charity fundraiser dinner. Create a seating plan diagram in draw.io based on the requirements file provided on the Desktop (gala_requirements.txt). The floor plan must include a rectangular stage at the top (North), a rectangular head table for 6 people facing the stage, 6 round guest tables arranged in 2 rows of 3, 8 chairs around each guest table, a bar in the bottom-right corner, and an entrance in the bottom-left corner. Number the guest tables 1 through 6, highlighting Table 1 and Table 2 with a gold or yellow fill color. Ensure all chairs are clearly visible. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/gala_seating_plan.drawio and export it to ~/Desktop/gala_seating_plan.png.
